message:
feat(storage): tick 171 notification cluster + vacuum/checkpoint route through send_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-second post-storage tick. Continues the storage-write
migration pattern. 6 more `_with_cx` methods inlined.

Migrated (6 methods):
- Notification cluster (tick 139, 4 methods):
  * record_notification_with_cx
  * update_notification_status_with_cx
  * acknowledge_notification_with_cx
  * increment_notification_retry_with_cx
- Maintenance cluster writes (tick 141, 2 methods):
  * vacuum_with_cx
  * checkpoint_with_cx

Each now inlines WriteCommand construction + `send_with_cx(cx, ...)`
instead of delegating to the legacy ambient-cx path.

Running tally of cx-first write methods routing through
`send_with_cx`:
- Tick 169: 6 (event-annotation)
- Tick 170: 6 (saved-search + pane-bookmark)
- Tick 171: 6 (notification + vacuum/checkpoint)
- Total: 18 / ~60+

Verified via fork bypass: 496/496 storage:: tests pass, including
the notification cluster roundtrip gate
(`storage_tick139_notification_cluster_roundtrip`) + maintenance
roundtrip gate (`storage_tick141_maintenance_cluster_roundtrip`).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
